Document:
# MOPPET-CLASS JANITORIAL SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Solar + Biofuel
# Shuttle Brief
A ship designed to be the new workhorse of cleaning duties in the sector, manufactured by the Zwergenkust Guild on behalf of the Maid's Guild.
# Ship Functions
The Moppet comes standard with a material reclaimer, service fab, shower, sink, drains, mobile pump, various janitorial essentials, and of course a free Janitorial Maid Dress!
Note that the solar array does not produce sufficient power for continuous thruster operation. Use the thruster power toggle button on the bridge to disable thrusters when docked if attempting to operate without consuming biofuel.
# Janitor
[textlink="Janitor" link="Janitor"/]
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
# PREFLIGHT CHECKLIST
[textlink="Preflight Checklist" link="PreflightChecklist"/]
For ideal performance, make sure to synchronize your solar array tracking speed to the value found at solar-powered stations at the beginning of each shift.
